name: VulnHub-Raven-2
isolation_note: Full VM on an isolated host-only VMware network. Add a hosts entry for raven2.lab (or retarget this descriptor with stage2/vm_lab.py), keep a clean snapshot, and keep the VM off bridged/NAT while testing.
rationale: Raven 2 adds the service/database privilege-escalation layer that Docker-only Web targets miss: a Web foothold to www-data followed by a MySQL/UDF-style host escalation to root.
